broker_fee_detail: No broker fee under NYC FARE Act; listing by NYC Luxury Apt Rentals Co LLC
broker_message: Hi Arman — interested in 3320 Avenue H #6F. Can you confirm whether this is a rental lease or a co-op needing board approval, the lease term, and full move-in costs? I'd also like to confirm the renovation is recent and ask about pest control, since I saw a building review mention roaches. If it shows well I'd like to discuss $1,875. Thanks!
broker_questions: Is this a co-op requiring board approval, or a straightforward lease? Any board fee?
Is it rent-stabilized? Prior legal rent?
The building has 2 open Class C violations — what are they and are they fixed?
A review mentions roaches and plumbing backing up — pest control and plumbing on the 6th floor?
Full move-in costs and lease term?
Who is my contact — Ira or Arman — and who signs the lease?
brokerage: NYC LUXURY APT RENTALS CO LLC
building_risk_rationale: Only 3 open HPD violations across ~90 units = 0.03/unit, far below the NYC average of 0.81 — a genuinely clean violation profile. What pushes to Medium: 2 of the 3 open are Class C (immediately hazardous), 5 evictions and 3 litigation cases, and a tenant review describing roaches and poor plumbing. Managing entities in the Victor Fein/Medallion orbit carry a below-average 2.9 owner rating. Low count, but qualitative signals and Class C items warrant direct questions.
commute_notes: IRT Nostrand Ave line terminal (2/5) at Flatbush Av–Brooklyn College is a ~5-min walk — you board at the origin, usually a seat. To Downtown Brooklyn ~20 min, Midtown/Union Sq ~45-50 min. StreetEasy's 'Q/B at Av H' is nearly a mile away; the 2/5 is the real access.
cons: 2 open Class C violations plus a review citing roaches/plumbing
Co-op vs. rental ambiguity could complicate the application
Priced at top of local band; a cheaper East Flatbush comp exists
leverage_notes: Sits at the top of the local 1BR band; a comparable East Flatbush unit (3420 Newkirk) is $1,758 and Gravesend/OP co-ops are $1,899. The Class C violations, pest review, and co-op ambiguity are real levers. Fresh (6 days) so expect a modest concession at most.
listed_by: Arman Ohevshalom, NYC LUXURY APT RENTALS CO LLC
noise_risks: Near Flatbush Ave commercial corridor and Junction shopping district
owner_entity: Managed via Medallion Real Estate / associated with Victor Fein portfolio
plain_english: A no-fee, renovated 1BR in an elevator co-op building steps from the 2/5 terminal at Brooklyn College. Listed only 6 days, so fresh, not sitting. The building's overall violation record is excellent, but a couple of hazardous (Class C) violations and a review about roaches/plumbing mean tour carefully and ask pointed pest/plumbing questions. Confirm whether renting requires co-op board approval before you invest in an application.
pros: Very low overall violation load (0.03/unit vs 0.81 city avg)
5-min walk to 2/5 terminal — likely a seat every morning
No fee, pets allowed, elevator + 24/7 super, renovated

red_flags.how_to_verify: Ask whether there's board approval, an application fee, and who signs the lease
red_flags.issue: Listed as a 'Co-op' but operating as a rent-stabilized rental
red_flags.why: Renting within a co-op can mean stricter board approval, longer application, uncertain renewal

red_flags.how_to_verify: Tour in person; confirm the renovation is recent
red_flags.issue: Current listing shows only 8 generic photos; 25 detailed photos on file are from 2017
red_flags.why: May not reflect current condition despite 'newly renovated'

red_flags.how_to_verify: Ask super about extermination and the tub-drain complaint; check HPD C-violation detail
red_flags.issue: 2 open Class C violations plus a review citing roaches and plumbing backups
red_flags.why: Pest and plumbing issues directly affect livability

red_flags.how_to_verify: Confirm you're dealing with the licensed agent of record
red_flags.issue: Description says 'call or text Ira' but the agent is Arman Ohevshalom
red_flags.why: Name mismatch can indicate an unlicensed cold-caller or churn

sources.label: openigloo 3320 Avenue H (violations, evictions, review, owners)
IRT Nostrand Ave (2/5) terminal near coords
